sourcesContent:
export const themes = {
  rose: { // ????(??)
    name: '????',
    nameEn: 'Rose Mist',
    bg: 'from-rose-50 via-pink-50 to-amber-50',
    sidebar: 'bg-white/65 backdrop-blur-md border-r border-pink-200/50 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(251,207,232,0.2)]',
    avatarRing: 'ring-pink-300/80',
    btnPrimary: 'bg-white/70 hover:bg-rose-100/70 text-rose-800 border border-rose-200/50',
    btnActive: 'bg-rose-100/80 shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(244,112,165,0.2)]',
    textMuted: 'text-rose-400/80',
    userBubble: 'bg-gradient-to-br from-rose-300 via-pink-200 to-amber-200 text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(244,112,165,0.25)]',
    aiBubble: 'bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-sm border border-pink-200 text-gray-700 shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)]',
    input: 'focus:ring-rose-300/50 border-pink-200',
    sendBtn: 'bg-gradient-to-r from-rose-300 to-pink-300 hover:from-rose-400 hover:to-pink-400 text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(244,112,165,0.3)]',
    modal: 'bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-pink-100',
    sectionTitle: 'text-rose-400',
    iconAccent: 'text-rose-400',
  },
  aqua: { // ????
    name: '????',
    nameEn: 'Aqua Breeze',
    bg: 'from-sky-50 via-blue-50 to-emerald-50',
    sidebar: 'bg-white/65 backdrop-blur-md border-r border-blue-200/50 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(186,230,253,0.2)]',
    avatarRing: 'ring-sky-300/80',
    btnPrimary: 'bg-white/70 hover:bg-blue-100/70 text-blue-800 border border-blue-200/50',
    btnActive: 'bg-blue-100/80 shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(56,189,248,0.2)]',
    textMuted: 'text-blue-400/80',
    userBubble: 'bg-gradient-to-br from-sky-300 via-blue-200 to-emerald-200 text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(56,189,248,0.25)]',
    aiBubble: 'bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-sm border border-blue-200 text-gray-700 shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)]',
    input: 'focus:ring-sky-300/50 border-blue-200',
    sendBtn: 'bg-gradient-to-r from-sky-300 to-blue-300 hover:from-sky-400 hover:to-blue-400 text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(56,189,248,0.3)]',
    modal: 'bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-blue-100',
    sectionTitle: 'text-sky-400',
    iconAccent: 'text-sky-400',
  },
  warm: { // ????
    name: '????',
    nameEn: 'Warm Taupe',
    bg: 'from-amber-50 via-orange-50 to-stone-100',
    sidebar: 'bg-white/65 backdrop-blur-md border-r border-amber-200/50 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(253,230,138,0.2)]',
    avatarRing: 'ring-amber-300/80',
    btnPrimary: 'bg-white/70 hover:bg-amber-100/70 text-amber-900 border border-amber-200/50',
    btnActive: 'bg-amber-100/80 shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(245,158,11,0.2)]',
    textMuted: 'text-amber-500/80',
    userBubble: 'bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-300 via-orange-200 to-yellow-200 text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(245,158,11,0.25)]',
    aiBubble: 'bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-sm border border-amber-200 text-gray-700 shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)]',
    input: 'focus:ring-amber-300/50 border-amber-200',
    sendBtn: 'bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-300 to-orange-300 hover:from-amber-400 hover:to-orange-400 text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(245,158,11,0.3)]',
    modal: 'bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-amber-100',
    sectionTitle: 'text-amber-400',
    iconAccent: 'text-amber-400',
  },
};
